rag_rules: Repair only AGREE clauses that directly cause unresolved reference or type errors in the current implementation scope.
generic_rules: Fix root unresolved identifiers before modifying guarantees or assignments.
Do not introduce new architecture elements to resolve AGREE errors; correct existing references.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees in implementation scope must refer only to visible features or locally declared eq helpers.
Assign statements must target existing output features or auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new features, connections, or annexes to fix unresolved name errors.
